title: Disaster teams aid fire-affected residents
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETT & KNYSNA NEWS - At least 20 dwellings were destroyed in a fire that broke out in Qolweni, Plettenberg Bay, during the early hours of Saturday morning 20 December.","html":"PLETT & KNYSNA NEWS - At least 20 dwellings were destroyed in a fire that broke out in Qolweni, Plettenberg Bay, during the early hours of Saturday morning 20 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to a media statement issued by the Bitou Municipality, the fire started at approximately 01:00. Fire and Rescue Services were dispatched to the scene and worked to contain and manage the blaze."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The cause of the fire is currently unknown and remains under investigation. Municipal officials confirmed that further details will be communicated once the investigation has been concluded.","html":"The cause of the fire is currently unknown and remains under investigation. Municipal officials confirmed that further details will be communicated once the investigation has been concluded."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Disaster Management teams were immediately deployed and are currently providing humanitarian relief to affected residents at the Bossiesgif Bicycle Shed. Verification of affected victims is ongoing.","html":"Disaster Management teams were immediately deployed and are currently providing humanitarian relief to affected residents at the Bossiesgif Bicycle Shed. Verification of affected victims is ongoing."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Municipal Disaster Management officials estimate that around 20 dwellings were impacted by the fire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Bitou Municipality expressed its appreciation to all key role players and organisations who assisted during the incident. Individual statements of appreciation will be issued to acknowledge the support received.","html":"The Bitou Municipality expressed its appreciation to all key role players and organisations who assisted during the incident. Individual statements of appreciation will be issued to acknowledge the support received."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In other news, community members from Nekkies have confirmed that the young man who sustained severe burns during the Nekkies fire in Knysna has sadly succumbed to his injuries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The identity of the victim has not yet been released to the media. Further updates will be provided in due course.","html":"The identity of the victim has not yet been released to the media. Further updates will be provided in due course."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A video of the blaze which occurred in Nekkies on Wednesday 17 December at 05:00 can be viewed on Knysna-Plett Herald's website.","html":"A video of the blaze which occurred in Nekkies on Wednesday 17 December at 05:00 can be viewed on Knysna-Plett Herald's website."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The aftermath of the Qolweni, Plettenberg Bay fire that destroyed approximately 20 households. Photo: Supplied","html":"The aftermath of the Qolweni, Plettenberg Bay fire that destroyed approximately 20 households. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
